  • Method Details

    • testConstructor_newServiceInstance_shouldHaveEmptyGrantsList

      @Test @DisplayName("Constructor: New GrantsService instance should have an empty list of grants") void testConstructor_newServiceInstance_shouldHaveEmptyGrantsList()

    • testAddGrant_validGrant_shouldBeAddedToInstanceList

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Valid grant should be added to the instance\'s list") void testAddGrant_validGrant_shouldBeAddedToInstanceList()

    • testAddGrant_nullGrant_shouldBeIgnored

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Null grant should be ignored") void testAddGrant_nullGrant_shouldBeIgnored()

    • testAddGrant_grantWithNullId_shouldBeIgnored

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Grant with null ID should be ignored") void testAddGrant_grantWithNullId_shouldBeIgnored()

    • testAddGrant_grantWithBlankId_shouldBeIgnored

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Grant with blank ID should be ignored") void testAddGrant_grantWithBlankId_shouldBeIgnored()

    • testAddGrant_multipleGrants_shouldAllBeAddedToInstanceList

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Multiple grants should all be added to the instance\'s list") void testAddGrant_multipleGrants_shouldAllBeAddedToInstanceList()

    • testAddGrant_toSeparateInstances_shouldNotAffectEachOther

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Adding to separate instances should not affect each other") void testAddGrant_toSeparateInstances_shouldNotAffectEachOther()

    • testAddGrant_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded

      @Test @DisplayName("addGrant: Grant with duplicate ID should also be added (List behavior)") void testAddGrant_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded()

    • testRemoveGrant_existingId_shouldRemoveFromInstanceAndReturnTrue

      @Test @DisplayName("removeGrant: Existing ID should remove from instance and return true") void testRemoveGrant_existingId_shouldRemoveFromInstanceAndReturnTrue()

    • testRemoveGrant_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeGrant: Non-existent ID should do nothing on instance and return false") void testRemoveGrant_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveGrant_nullId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeGrant: Null ID should do nothing on instance and return false") void testRemoveGrant_nullId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveGrant_blankId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeGrant: Blank ID should do nothing on instance and return false") void testRemoveGrant_blankId_shouldDoNothingOnInstanceAndReturnFalse()

      @Test @DisplayName("getAllGrants: After adding, should return all added grants for instance") void testGetAllGrants_afterAdding_shouldReturnAllAddedGrantsForInstance()

      @Test @DisplayName("getAllGrants: Ensure returned list is a copy for instance") void testGetAllGrants_ensureReturnedListIsCopyForInstance()

    • testClearGrants_onInstance_shouldEmptyItsGrantsListAndNotAffectOtherInstances

      @Test @DisplayName("clearGrants: Should empty the instance\'s grants list and not affect other instances") void testClearGrants_onInstance_shouldEmptyItsGrantsListAndNotAffectOtherInstances()
